source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.chinese_topic: 共奏人工智能发展全球合作的交响
topics.official_english: China calls for global cooperation on AI development
topics.why_hot: AI is a hot global topic; China's stance on international cooperation attracts attention.
topics.share_angle: Explain China's vision for global AI collaboration and its implications.

topics.chinese_topic: 锂电池要和成品油一样交消费税了
topics.official_english: Lithium batteries to be subject to consumption tax like refined oil products
topics.why_hot: Affects EV industry and consumer costs; policy change sparks debate.
topics.share_angle: Discuss the impact of new tax on EV adoption and battery industry.

topics.chinese_topic: 重庆山体崩塌最大山石相当于1栋楼
topics.official_english: Massive rockslide in Chongqing: largest boulder the size of a building
topics.why_hot: Natural disaster with dramatic visuals; public concern for safety.
topics.share_angle: Cover the event and geological risks in mountainous regions.

topics.chinese_topic: 气象台不敢报40℃？真相来了
topics.official_english: Weather stations afraid to report 40°C? The truth revealed
topics.why_hot: Heatwave skepticism; public trust in official data.
topics.share_angle: Explain how temperature readings work and address public doubts.

topics.chinese_topic: 高端白酒3天卖了1年的量 店员报警
topics.official_english: Premium liquor sells annual volume in 3 days; store staff calls police
topics.why_hot: Unusual buying frenzy; hints at speculation or panic buying.
topics.share_angle: Analyze the reasons behind the rush and market implications.

topics.chinese_topic: 清华“一页纸”录取通知书长这样
topics.why_hot: Innovative design; education-related and visually appealing.
topics.share_angle: Showcase the minimalist design and its symbolic meaning.

topics.why_hot: AI in healthcare is a trending topic; hope and hype coexist.
topics.share_angle: Discuss current AI applications in cancer research and limitations.

topics.chinese_topic: 大热天的 世界杯球员为啥非穿长袜
topics.official_english: Why do World Cup players wear long socks in hot weather?
topics.why_hot: World Cup season; curious sports trivia engages fans.
topics.share_angle: Explain the functional reasons behind long socks in football.
